paragraphs.chinese: 我到了宾馆。我想住一个房间。服务员问我想住几天。
paragraphs.pinyin: Wǒ dào le bīnguǎn. Wǒ xiǎng zhù yí ge fángjiān. Fúwùyuán wèn wǒ xiǎng zhù jǐ tiān.
paragraphs.english: I arrived at the hotel. I want to stay in a room. The attendant asked me how many days I want to stay.

paragraphs.chinese: 我说住两天。房间很干净，也很大。我很满意。
paragraphs.pinyin: Wǒ shuō zhù liǎng tiān. Fángjiān hěn gānjìng, yě hěn dà. Wǒ hěn mǎnyì.
paragraphs.english: I said two days. The room is very clean and also very big. I'm very satisfied.

paragraphs.chinese: 我每天坐公共汽车去上班。公共汽车站离我家很近。
paragraphs.pinyin: Wǒ měi tiān zuò gōnggòng qìchē qù shàng bān. Gōnggòng qìchē zhàn lí wǒ jiā hěn jìn.
paragraphs.english: I take the bus to work every day. The bus stop is very close to my home.

paragraphs.chinese: 今天公共汽车上人很多。我没有座位，只能站着。但是路不远，很快就到了。
paragraphs.pinyin: Jīntiān gōnggòng qìchē shang rén hěn duō. Wǒ méiyǒu zuòwèi, zhǐ néng zhàn zhe. Dànshì lù bù yuǎn, hěn kuài jiù dào le.
paragraphs.english: Today there are many people on the bus. I don't have a seat and can only stand. But the road isn't far, and we arrived quickly.

paragraphs.chinese: 我想学做饭。妈妈说她可以教我。
paragraphs.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng xué zuò fàn. Māma shuō tā kěyǐ jiāo wǒ.
paragraphs.english: I want to learn to cook. Mom says she can teach me.

paragraphs.chinese: 今天我们做了一个西红柿炒鸡蛋。很简单，但是非常好吃。我觉得做饭很有意思。
paragraphs.pinyin: Jīntiān wǒmen zuò le yí ge xīhóngshì chǎo jīdàn. Hěn jiǎndān, dànshì fēicháng hǎochī. Wǒ juéde zuò fàn hěn yǒu yìsi.
paragraphs.english: Today we made scrambled eggs with tomatoes. Very simple, but extremely delicious. I think cooking is very interesting.

paragraphs.chinese: 这个周末我不用上班。我打算和朋友一起去公园玩。
paragraphs.pinyin: Zhè ge zhōumò wǒ bú yòng shàng bān. Wǒ dǎsuàn hé péngyǒu yìqǐ qù gōngyuán wán.
paragraphs.english: I don't have to work this weekend. I plan to go to the park with friends.

paragraphs.chinese: 如果天气好，我们去跑步。如果下雨，我们就去看电影。
paragraphs.pinyin: Rúguǒ tiānqì hǎo, wǒmen qù pǎobù. Rúguǒ xià yǔ, wǒmen jiù qù kàn diànyǐng.
paragraphs.english: If the weather is good, we'll go running. If it rains, we'll go see a movie.

paragraphs.chinese: 我今天不太舒服。我的头疼，嗓子也疼。
paragraphs.pinyin: Wǒ jīntiān bú tài shūfu. Wǒ de tóu téng, sǎngzi yě téng.
paragraphs.english: I don't feel well today. My head hurts, and my throat hurts too.

paragraphs.chinese: 妈妈带我去看医生。医生说我感冒了，要多喝水，多休息。他给我开了一些药。
paragraphs.pinyin: Māma dài wǒ qù kàn yīshēng. Yīshēng shuō wǒ gǎnmào le, yào duō hē shuǐ, duō xiūxi. Tā gěi wǒ kāi le yìxiē yào.
paragraphs.english: Mom took me to see the doctor. The doctor said I have a cold, and I should drink more water and rest more. He prescribed some medicine for me.

paragraphs.chinese: 我每天早上跑步。跑步对身体很好。
paragraphs.pinyin: Wǒ měi tiān zǎoshang pǎobù. Pǎobù duì shēntǐ hěn hǎo.
paragraphs.english: I run every morning. Running is very good for the body.

paragraphs.chinese: 我的哥哥喜欢打篮球。他打得很好。我们周末经常一起运动。
paragraphs.pinyin: Wǒ de gēge xǐhuān dǎ lánqiú. Tā dǎ de hěn hǎo. Wǒmen zhōumò jīngcháng yìqǐ yùndòng.
paragraphs.english: My older brother likes playing basketball. He plays very well. We often exercise together on weekends.

paragraphs.chinese: 我的房间不太大，但是很干净。房间里有一张床、一张桌子和一把椅子。
paragraphs.pinyin: Wǒ de fángjiān bú tài dà, dànshì hěn gānjìng. Fángjiān lǐ yǒu yì zhāng chuáng, yì zhāng zhuōzi hé yì bǎ yǐzi.
paragraphs.english: My room is not very big, but it's very clean. In the room there is a bed, a desk, and a chair.

paragraphs.chinese: 桌子上面有很多书。我喜欢在房间里看书和听音乐。
paragraphs.pinyin: Zhuōzi shàngmiàn yǒu hěn duō shū. Wǒ xǐhuān zài fángjiān lǐ kàn shū hé tīng yīnyuè.
paragraphs.english: There are many books on the desk. I like reading and listening to music in my room.

paragraphs.chinese: 请问，去火车站怎么走？你从这里一直往前走，到路口往左拐。
paragraphs.pinyin: Qǐngwèn, qù huǒchē zhàn zěnme zǒu? Nǐ cóng zhèlǐ yìzhí wǎng qián zǒu, dào lùkǒu wǎng zuǒ guǎi.
paragraphs.english: Excuse me, how do I get to the train station? Go straight from here, and turn left at the intersection.

paragraphs.chinese: 火车站就在银行旁边。走路大概十分钟。
paragraphs.pinyin: Huǒchē zhàn jiù zài yínháng pángbiān. Zǒulù dàgài shí fēnzhōng.
paragraphs.english: The train station is right next to the bank. It's about ten minutes on foot.

paragraphs.chinese: 我想买一件新衣服。这件红色的裙子很漂亮。
paragraphs.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng mǎi yí jiàn xīn yīfu. Zhè jiàn hóngsè de qúnzi hěn piàoliang.
paragraphs.english: I want to buy a new piece of clothing. This red dress is very pretty.

paragraphs.chinese: 多少钱？两百块。太贵了！那件怎么样？那件一百块。好的，我要那件。
paragraphs.pinyin: Duōshao qián? Liǎng bǎi kuài. Tài guì le! Nà jiàn zěnmeyàng? Nà jiàn yì bǎi kuài. Hǎo de, wǒ yào nà jiàn.
paragraphs.english: How much? 200 yuan. Too expensive! How about that one? That one is 100 yuan. Okay, I'll take that one.

paragraphs.chinese: 我要给老师发一封电子邮件。我告诉老师，我明天不能去上课，因为我生病了。
paragraphs.pinyin: Wǒ yào gěi lǎoshī fā yì fēng diànzǐ yóujiàn. Wǒ gàosu lǎoshī, wǒ míngtiān bù néng qù shàng kè, yīnwèi wǒ shēng bìng le.
paragraphs.english: I need to send the teacher an email. I tell the teacher that I can't go to class tomorrow because I'm sick.

paragraphs.chinese: 老师回信说：「没关系，你好好休息。下个星期我把这个星期的作业给你。」
paragraphs.pinyin: Lǎoshī huí xìn shuō: "Méi guānxi, nǐ hǎohǎo xiūxi. Xià ge xīngqī wǒ bǎ zhè ge xīngqī de zuòyè gěi nǐ."
paragraphs.english: The teacher replied: "No problem, rest well. Next week I'll give you this week's homework."

paragraphs.chinese: 下个星期是妈妈的生日。小明想给妈妈买一个礼物。但是他不知道买什么好。
paragraphs.pinyin: Xià ge xīngqī shì māma de shēngrì. Xiǎomíng xiǎng gěi māma mǎi yí ge lǐwù. Dànshì tā bù zhīdào mǎi shénme hǎo.
paragraphs.english: Next week is Mom's birthday. Xiaoming wants to buy Mom a gift. But he doesn't know what to buy.

paragraphs.chinese: 他先去了书店。妈妈喜欢看书，可是她的书已经很多了。
paragraphs.pinyin: Tā xiān qù le shūdiàn. Māma xǐhuān kàn shū, kěshì tā de shū yǐjīng hěn duō le.
paragraphs.english: He first went to the bookstore. Mom likes reading, but she already has a lot of books.

paragraphs.chinese: 然后他去了花店。他买了一束漂亮的花。但是他觉得还不够。
paragraphs.pinyin: Ránhòu tā qù le huā diàn. Tā mǎi le yí shù piàoliang de huā. Dànshì tā juéde hái bú gòu.
paragraphs.english: Then he went to the flower shop. He bought a beautiful bouquet of flowers. But he felt it wasn't enough.

paragraphs.chinese: 最后他想到了一个好主意。他回家给妈妈做了一顿晚饭。他做了妈妈最喜欢吃的菜。
paragraphs.pinyin: Zuìhòu tā xiǎng dào le yí ge hǎo zhǔyì. Tā huí jiā gěi māma zuò le yí dùn wǎnfàn. Tā zuò le māma zuì xǐhuān chī de cài.
paragraphs.english: Finally he thought of a good idea. He went home and made dinner for Mom. He made Mom's favorite dish.

paragraphs.chinese: 妈妈回来了。她看到桌子上的花和饭菜，非常高兴。她说：「这是我收到的最好的礼物！」
paragraphs.pinyin: Māma huílái le. Tā kàn dào zhuōzi shang de huā hé fàncài, fēicháng gāoxìng. Tā shuō: "Zhè shì wǒ shōu dào de zuì hǎo de lǐwù!"
paragraphs.english: Mom came home. She saw the flowers and food on the table, and was very happy. She said: "This is the best gift I've ever received!"

paragraphs.chinese: 今天我们班来了一个新同学。他叫大卫，是美国人。他来中国学中文。
paragraphs.pinyin: Jīntiān wǒmen bān lái le yí ge xīn tóngxué. Tā jiào Dàwèi, shì Měiguó rén. Tā lái Zhōngguó xué Zhōngwén.
paragraphs.english: Today a new classmate came to our class. His name is David, and he's American. He came to China to study Chinese.

paragraphs.chinese: 大卫的中文说得还不太好。有时候我们听不懂他说的话。但是他学得很努力。
paragraphs.pinyin: Dàwèi de Zhōngwén shuō de hái bú tài hǎo. Yǒu shíhou wǒmen tīng bù dǒng tā shuō de huà. Dànshì tā xué de hěn nǔlì.
paragraphs.english: David's Chinese is not very good yet. Sometimes we can't understand what he says. But he studies very hard.

paragraphs.chinese: 下课以后，我帮他复习生词。我教他怎么写汉字。他很高兴。
paragraphs.pinyin: Xià kè yǐhòu, wǒ bāng tā fùxí shēngcí. Wǒ jiāo tā zěnme xiě Hànzì. Tā hěn gāoxìng.
paragraphs.english: After class, I help him review new words. I teach him how to write Chinese characters. He's very happy.

paragraphs.chinese: 他也教我说英语。我们成了好朋友。我觉得帮助别人很快乐。
paragraphs.pinyin: Tā yě jiāo wǒ shuō Yīngyǔ. Wǒmen chéng le hǎo péngyǒu. Wǒ juéde bāngzhù biéren hěn kuàilè.
paragraphs.english: He also teaches me English. We became good friends. I think helping others is very joyful.

paragraphs.chinese: 星期天天气很好，我和姐姐去公园玩。公园里的人很多。
paragraphs.pinyin: Xīngqītiān tiānqì hěn hǎo, wǒ hé jiějie qù gōngyuán wán. Gōngyuán lǐ de rén hěn duō.
paragraphs.english: The weather is nice on Sunday, and my older sister and I go to the park. There are a lot of people in the park.

paragraphs.chinese: 有的人在跑步，有的人在打太极拳，还有的人在唱歌。
paragraphs.pinyin: Yǒu de rén zài pǎobù, yǒu de rén zài dǎ tàijí quán, hái yǒu de rén zài chàng gē.
paragraphs.english: Some people are running, some are doing tai chi, and others are singing.

paragraphs.chinese: 我们走了很长时间。姐姐说她饿了。我们找了一家小饭馆吃午饭。
paragraphs.pinyin: Wǒmen zǒu le hěn cháng shíjiān. Jiějie shuō tā è le. Wǒmen zhǎo le yì jiā xiǎo fànguǎn chī wǔfàn.
paragraphs.english: We walked for a long time. My sister said she was hungry. We found a small restaurant and had lunch.

paragraphs.chinese: 吃完饭以后，我们去湖边坐了一会儿。湖水很清，旁边有很多花。
paragraphs.pinyin: Chī wán fàn yǐhòu, wǒmen qù hú biān zuò le yíhuìr. Hú shuǐ hěn qīng, pángbiān yǒu hěn duō huā.
paragraphs.english: After eating, we sat by the lake for a while. The lake water is clear, and there are many flowers beside it.

paragraphs.chinese: 今天玩得很开心。下次我还想来这个公园。
paragraphs.pinyin: Jīntiān wán de hěn kāixīn. Xià cì wǒ hái xiǎng lái zhè ge gōngyuán.
paragraphs.english: We had a great time today. I want to come to this park again next time.

paragraphs.chinese: 今天外面下大雨了。我不能出去玩。我只能在家里。
paragraphs.pinyin: Jīntiān wàimiàn xià dà yǔ le. Wǒ bù néng chūqù wán. Wǒ zhǐ néng zài jiā lǐ.
paragraphs.english: It's raining heavily outside today. I can't go out to play. I can only stay at home.

paragraphs.chinese: 早上我看了两个小时的书。然后我觉得有点儿无聊。
paragraphs.pinyin: Zǎoshang wǒ kàn le liǎng ge xiǎoshí de shū. Ránhòu wǒ juéde yǒudiǎnr wúliáo.
paragraphs.english: In the morning I read for two hours. Then I felt a bit bored.

paragraphs.chinese: 我打电话给我的好朋友小王。小王说他也在家。我请他来我家玩。
paragraphs.pinyin: Wǒ dǎ diànhuà gěi wǒ de hǎo péngyǒu Xiǎo Wáng. Xiǎo Wáng shuō tā yě zài jiā. Wǒ qǐng tā lái wǒ jiā wán.
paragraphs.english: I called my good friend Xiao Wang. Xiao Wang said he was also at home. I invited him to come to my home.

paragraphs.chinese: 小王来了以后，我们一起下棋，一起看电影。妈妈给我们做了好吃的点心。
paragraphs.pinyin: Xiǎo Wáng lái le yǐhòu, wǒmen yìqǐ xià qí, yìqǐ kàn diànyǐng. Māma gěi wǒmen zuò le hǎochī de diǎnxīn.
paragraphs.english: After Xiao Wang came, we played chess and watched a movie together. Mom made us delicious snacks.

paragraphs.chinese: 虽然外面一直下雨，但是我们在家玩得很开心。
paragraphs.pinyin: Suīrán wàimiàn yìzhí xià yǔ, dànshì wǒmen zài jiā wán de hěn kāixīn.
paragraphs.english: Although it kept raining outside, we had a great time at home.
